title: Balloon Weights 6 Pack Iridescent Foil, Suitable for Helium Balloons at Birthdays, Parties, Events, Weddings & Celebrations, Heavy & Durable 85g
features: Balloon weights: Keep your helium balloons securely grounded with these iridescent balloon weights, perfect for adding sparkle to any celebration
Helium balloon weights: Designed to hold multiple helium-filled balloons, these iridescent weights offer both function and style for any event decor
Balloon weights: Each weight has a dazzling iridescent finish reflects light beautifully, enhancing your party decor with a magical, shimmering effect
Helium balloon weights: Ideal for birthdays, weddings, or baby showers, these versatile weights are easy to use and perfect for both indoor and outdoor use
Balloon weights: Add a touch of elegance and functionality to your celebrations with these eye-catching iridescent balloon weights that double as stylish table decor
description: Add a magical touch to your event decor with our 6 Pack Iridescent Helium Balloon Weights, the perfect accessory to keep your helium balloons in place while enhancing your partyâ€s aesthetic. These stunning balloon weights are designed to secure multiple helium-filled balloons, making them ideal for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, and more. Each weight features a captivating iridescent finish that reflects light beautifully, creating a shimmering effect that elevates any celebration. Our helium balloon weights are not only practical but also add a unique, eye-catching element to your table settings or balloon bouquets. Easy to use and highly durable, these iridescent weights are perfect for both indoor and outdoor events, ensuring your decor remains intact throughout your special occasion. With their elegant and versatile design, these balloon weights are a must-have for anyone looking to add a touch of sparkle to their party decor. Keep your balloons grounded in style with these standout iridescent weights!
